title: Document automated versioning and release workflow
description: Update developer documentation to describe the new GitHub Actions release flow, including automatic patch bumps on successful pushes to `main`, manual major/minor bump expectations, and the fact that publishing uses the built-in `GITHUB_TOKEN`.
acceptance_criteria: Documentation explains that pushes to `main` run tests, build the package, and publish a GitHub release automatically.
Documentation explains that CI auto-bumps only the patch version and that developers must bump major/minor locally before pushing.
Documentation does not promise any manual secret setup beyond the built-in `GITHUB_TOKEN`.
The documented behavior matches the final workflow YAML.
